name: snapfire_post_wheel_shallow

routes.note: The primary, attacks the deep middle between the safeties
Sells short then turns up the sideline, cannot be pressed by a man defender
The drag underneath, the checkdown and the man-coverage outlet
Clear the deep defenders to open the post and wheel

routes.route: Read post to wheel to shallow
routes.note: Empty set, no back to check, get it out on rhythm

reads: **Pre-Snap:** Empty, read the middle-of-field safety. One high opens the post, two high opens the wheel up the sideline
**1️⃣ Post:** Take it when the deep middle is open and the verticals have cleared
**2️⃣ Wheel:** Hits up the sideline versus man (cannot be pressed) or when the corner sinks
**3️⃣ Shallow:** The underneath outlet, take the easy yards if the deep stuff is covered
usage_notes:
**Beats:** Single-high (the post) and man coverage (the wheel and shallow)
**Coach's Key:** Empty has no protection help, the ball must come out on time

name: snapfire_fake_jet_pass_power

routes.note: Despite the name this is a RUN, the power hits downhill behind the pull
Fakes the jet to hold the backside edge, no handoff
Kicks the force, the back runs off his block
Playside down-blocks and a double team up to the linebacker

reads: **Pre-Snap:** The name says pass but the art is a power RUN, the jet is a fake to freeze the edge
**1️⃣ Jet fake holds the backside:** run power downhill behind the kick
**Read the kickout:** if the end spills, bounce; if he is kicked, follow the pull inside
usage_notes:
**Beats:** Edge defenders who honor the jet, the fake removes them from the power
**Coach's Key:** This is a run, do not look to throw it

name: snapfire_power_read

routes.note: Read the end man on the line; keep through the B gap behind the wrap when he widens
The give; hits the edge with blockers in front when the read key crashes
Pull through the hole to the play-side linebacker
Backside gap rules with a double team up to the backside linebacker
Stalk the perimeter for the sweep

reads: **Pre-Snap:** A loaded box is fine here: the end man on the line goes unblocked and becomes the read key, so the extra defender is in conflict
**1️⃣ Read key crashes inside:** give the sweep, the back wins the edge with blockers in front
**2️⃣ Read key stays outside or upfield:** keep it, QB power downhill through the B gap behind the wrapping guard
**🚨 No pass option:** this is a run-run option (also called inverted veer), the only decision is give or keep
usage_notes:
**Beats:** Loaded boxes, conservative option defense (the read key plays the QB, crashes inside, and the sweep runs free)
**Coach's Key:** Hold the keep button (X on PlayStation, A on Xbox) when the read key stands up; do nothing and the give happens on its own

name: snapfire_01_trap

routes.note: Same-side downhill through the A gap; stay patient and cut off the trap block
Backside guard pulls to kick out the first defensive lineman outside the play-side guard
Leaves the trap target alone and climbs straight to the Mike
Backside gap rules; vs odd fronts expect a double team on the nose up to a backer
Stalk the perimeter; nobody runs a route on this play

reads: **Pre-Snap:** Find the first defensive lineman outside the play-side guard; he is the trap target and the lane opens inside his vacated spot
**1️⃣ Mesh:** Straight handoff, same-side run; defenses expect shotgun runs to cross the formation, so users often fly the wrong way
**2️⃣ RB track:** Downhill through the A gap behind the down blocks; vs odd fronts the trap block on a wide 4i makes the hole huge
**🚨 Check out of it:** vs double mug or six-plus defenders stacked on the line, audible out; trap struggles vs a loaded line of scrimmage
usage_notes:
**Beats:** Odd fronts (3-3-5, Mint, Penny, 3-2-6, dime 2-3 odd), pinched lines, users jumping the inside zone stereotype
**Coach's Key:** Trap is an alternate way to run power; same gap rules, but the play-side guard free releases and the puller traps the first lineman outside him

name: snapfire_escort_power_read_toss

routes.note: The give; the toss widens the sweep track to the edge
Keep downhill through the B gap when the read key widens with the toss
Pull to the play-side linebacker
Bunch receivers block the perimeter for the toss
Backside gap rules with a double team to the backside linebacker

reads: **Pre-Snap:** Find the end man on the line; he is the read key and nobody blocks him
**1️⃣ Read key crashes inside:** toss it, the back gets the edge behind the bunch blocks
**2️⃣ Read key stays outside:** keep it, QB power through the B gap behind the wrap
**🚨 No pass option:** toss or keep, decided by the read key
usage_notes:
**Beats:** Loaded boxes, conservative option defense, defenses that widen with the bunch
**Coach's Key:** Same power read rules with a toss instead of a sweep; the pitch gets the back to the edge faster

name: snapfire_jet_power_read

routes.note: Full-speed motion; the give, and the handoff is automatic when the read key crashes
Keep through the B gap when the read key stays outside
Leaks out to block the safety for the sweep
Pull to the play-side linebacker
Down blocks with a double team up to the backside linebacker

reads: **Pre-Snap:** Find the end man on the line of scrimmage; he is the read key and nobody blocks him
**1️⃣ Read key crashes inside:** the jet sweep handoff happens automatically, perimeter blockers are already out front
**2️⃣ Read key stays outside:** keep it, QB power through the B gap behind the wrap
**🚨 No pass option:** jet sweep or QB power, the read key decides
usage_notes:
**Beats:** Loaded boxes, edge defenders who chase jet motion, goal line fronts
**Coach's Key:** Opponents who think the jet is a fake will crash inside and hand the sweep the edge; this play stays solid near the goal line

name: snapfire_jet_qb_zone

routes.note: Takes the zone path behind the line off the jet action
Motions across the formation, a decoy that pulls the edge defender
Covered drive, uncovered combo and climb to the linebacker
Wall off the perimeter defenders

reads: **Pre-Snap:** Empty QB-run look, the jet motion stretches the edge and counts a hat for the box
**1️⃣ Jet pulls the edge:** the QB keeps on the zone path inside
**Back's read:** bang the A gap, bend the B gap, bounce outside if the front overflows
usage_notes:
**Beats:** Light boxes and edge defenders who chase the jet motion
**Coach's Key:** Needs a mobile QB, this is a quarterback-carrier run

name: snapfire_jet_qb_zone_wk

routes.note: Runs the zone path to the weak side off the jet action
Motions across to hold the play-side edge
Covered drive, uncovered combo and climb
Wall the perimeter

reads: **Pre-Snap:** The weak-side mirror of Jet QB Zone, call it to run away from the defense's strength
**1️⃣ Jet holds the edge:** keep the QB on the weak-side zone path
**Back's read:** bang, bend, bounce off the line's movement
usage_notes:
**Beats:** Defenses that set strength to the jet motion, you run away from it
**Coach's Key:** Mobile QB required

Pull through the hole to the play-side linebacker
Backside gap rules with a double team up to the backside linebacker
Stalk the perimeter for the sweep

name: snapfire_jet_qb_counter

routes.note: Counter-steps off the jet, follows the pullers downhill
Flows one way to pull the defense, the counter hits back the other way
One kicks the edge, one wraps to the play-side linebacker
Backside gap rules, wall off the lane

reads: **Pre-Snap:** The jet motion sets the flow, the counter goes back against it
**1️⃣ Defense chases the jet:** the QB counters behind the pullers into the vacated side
**🚨 Patience:** let the pullers clear before pressing the hole
usage_notes:
**Beats:** Fast-flowing, jet-chasing defenses (the counter punishes over-pursuit)
**Coach's Key:** Mobile QB, time it behind the kick and wrap

name: snapfire_jet_touch_pass-4

routes.note: Catches a quick flip on the perimeter at full speed off the motion
Stalk and crack the perimeter defenders to spring the catch
Brief protection, the ball comes out instantly
Touch it to the jet man before the edge can react

reads: **Pre-Snap:** A glorified outside-zone to the edge, get the fast man the ball in space
**1️⃣ Edge stays inside:** flip it to the jet on the perimeter with blockers in front
**🚨 If the edge widens with the motion:** pull it down, the space is gone
usage_notes:
**Beats:** Pinched fronts and slow edge defenders, it attacks the perimeter they vacate
**Coach's Key:** Get the ball out instantly, this is a perimeter run by another name
